components.name: 🏆 Bold Brand Story
components.desc: Left-image about section with strong mission statement — converts visitors to believers

props.heading: We're Not an Agency. We're Your Growth Partner.
props.subheading: A decade of building what matters
props.body:
In 2014, we started with a single belief: that great software should be within reach of every business, not just the Fortune 500.

Over the past decade, we've helped 12,000+ companies — from solo founders to global enterprises — build their digital presence, automate their ops, and grow revenue without burning out their teams.

We don't just build products. We build trust.
props.highlight: 12,000+ companies trust us. 98% renew every year.

props.quote: We evaluated 14 platforms before choosing this one. Nothing else came close. Within 6 weeks of going live, our conversion rate jumped 34% and our bounce rate dropped by half. ROI was clear within the first month.
props.author: Layla Al-Mansouri

props.t2Desc: For growing businesses that need more.

components.name: ❓ Dark FAQ — 6 Questions
components.desc: Accordion FAQ with dark bg — covers trial, cancellation, security, and billing

props.heading: Questions? We've Got Answers.
props.subheading: If you don't find what you're looking for, our team typically replies within 2 hours.
props.q1: Do I need a credit card to start?
props.a1: No. Your free plan is free forever — no credit card required. You only enter payment details when you choose to upgrade to a paid plan.
props.a2: When you upgrade, you get 14 days free with full access to all Pro features. If you're not 100% satisfied, cancel before day 14 and you won't be charged — guaranteed.
props.q3: Can I export my website if I leave?
props.a3: Absolutely. You own your content. Export everything as clean, production-ready HTML, React components, or a JSON backup — any time, with one click.
props.a4: Yes. We use AES-256 encryption, daily automated backups, and are SOC 2 Type II certified. Your data is hosted on geo-redundant servers with 99.99% uptime SLA.
props.q5: Do you offer discounts for startups or non-profits?
props.a5: Yes — we offer 50% off for verified startups (under 2 years, under $1M ARR) and non-profit organisations. Reach out to our team with verification and we'll sort it within 24 hours.
props.q6: What happens if I hit my plan limits?
props.a6: We'll notify you at 80% usage and again at 100%. You'll never be hard-blocked — we give you a 7-day grace period to upgrade before any restrictions apply.
